steps.name: authorization-safe-adapter-proof-plan
steps.summary: PPR1 added scripts/private_parser_authorization_safe_adapter_proof.py, tests/test_private_parser_authorization_safe_adapter_proof.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ppr1-authorization-safe-adapter-proof.md. It confirms realistic private parser work remains explicit-authorization-gated, local-only, deletion-aware, and structured-facts-only for public reporting.

steps.name: realistic-local-fixture-adapter-contract
steps.summary: PPR2 added scripts/private_parser_fixture_adapter_contract.py, tests/test_private_parser_fixture_adapter_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ppr2-fixture-adapter-contract.md. It defines synthetic local fixture file classes, structured-facts-only output schema, redaction fields, and parser failure states without claiming real protected file ingestion.

steps.name: deletion-and-retention-rehearsal
steps.summary: PPR3 added scripts/private_parser_deletion_retention_rehearsal.py, tests/test_private_parser_deletion_retention_rehearsal.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ppr3-deletion-retention-rehearsal.md. It rehearses local artifact lifecycle states where raw local fixtures end deleted and structured fact/redaction reports may be retained as public-safe evidence.

steps.name: parser-leak-and-public-report-gate
steps.summary: PPR4 added scripts/private_parser_public_report_leak_gate.py, tests/test_private_parser_public_report_leak_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ppr4-public-report-leak-gate.md. It scans PPR public reports for blocked markers, uses synthetic negative cases only, and avoids printing marker contents in public machine output.

steps.name: horizon-close-and-source-connector-handoff
steps.summary: PPR5 added scripts/private_parser_realism_close_gate.py, tests/test_private_parser_realism_close_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-private-parser-realism-hardening-close-report.md. The horizon closes as realism_contract_ready: no real protected payload ingestion is claimed, explicit authorization remains required, and next horizon is external-source-body-connector-expansion.
